channel.title: jury-animation on die seriale en

item.title: Stefan Vogt
item.description: ## Stefan Vogt Creator of Animation Films | sticktogetherfilms | Germany Stefan Vogt was born in Trier. Left. Never came back. Studied animation-film under professor Paul Driessen and Andreas Hykade at Art University of Kassel. Now living and working in Berlin - he has created several relatively well-known animated series: “Warum!”, “Gott kommt”, “Zusammen” and “Wunschlos hubbelig”. In 2022, films by him were shown as part of the Documenta 15 art exhibition.
